prompt: A bold modern promotional poster for VIVAJUICE in a bright urban corridor with a polished reflective floor and colorful graffiti mural along the left wall. The composition is a dynamic low-angle lifestyle product ad featuring one crouching young woman in the center background wearing a vivid red windbreaker jacket, white crop top, black jogger pants, and white sneakers, with curly dark hair tied up messily. Her face is intentionally soft and de-emphasized while her hand thrusts a large juice bottle toward the camera in extreme foreground, creating dramatic perspective and making the bottle dominate the frame. The hero bottle is a chilled clear plastic bottle with condensation droplets, black cap, orange juice inside, and a cream label reading SUNRISE MANGO with the slogan “Drink Fresh. Live Bold.” and ripe mango fruit illustrations near the bottom. Across the top, place a large oversized headline in two layers: dark green block letters reading FRESH and a mint-green hand-painted brush script overlay reading EVERY SIP. Put the logo at the upper left with a simple leaf mark above the wordmark and the tagline beneath it. Below the headline, include exactly 4 minimalist black line-icon feature badges arranged horizontally with captions: “NO ADDED SUGAR”, “100% NATURAL”, “NO PRESERVATIVES”, and “NOT FROM CONCENTRATE”. At the bottom right foreground, place exactly 3 smaller standing bottles in a neat row: a yellow-orange bottle labeled “TROPICAL BURST”, a bright pink-red bottle labeled “BERRY BLISS”, and a light green bottle labeled “KIWI COOLER”. Add small footer text and social/website callouts along the bottom edge, including an Instagram handle, website, and hashtag. Use clean commercial advertising photography, energetic health-brand aesthetics, crisp focus on the products, high contrast, bright natural indoor lighting, fresh green-and-orange color palette, premium beverage branding, sharp typography, and a sleek lifestyle campaign look.
